tasks.legacyMigrationError: Schema mismatch — legacy field types incompatible

requirements.stripePaypal: Payment Platform v2 must support Stripe, PayPal, and crypto
requirements.dashboardPerf: Dashboard must load in under 2s on 3G
requirements.openApiDocs: All API endpoints must have OpenAPI docs
requirements.offlineCore: Mobile app must work offline for core features
requirements.gdpr: GDPR compliance for all user data

general.secretaryMorning: Good morning team. 18 employees active, 12 tasks in progress. Today's priorities: Payment API review, Dashboard components, Q2 research deadline.
general.alexReport: Good progress. @Research Lead — I need the competitive report for the board meeting Friday. Can we have it by Thursday?
general.researchLeadReply: Absolutely, Alex. Report is at 90%. I'll have the final version with executive summary by Thursday morning.
general.engLeadApi: Payment reconciliation API is ready for review. @QA Lead please prioritize — this touches the financial pipeline.
general.qaLeadReply: On it. Test report by EOD. Regression suite caught 2 edge cases in the webhook handler — fixes pushed.

engineering.sarahArchitecture: Team, I've reviewed the payment architecture doc. The idempotency approach looks solid. One concern: have we considered the distributed lock expiry under high load?
engineering.srBackendReply: Good catch. I've added a sliding window extension — if the operation is still running when TTL hits 80%, it auto-extends. PR updated.
engineering.devopsCi: CI pipeline green. Build time down to 4m32s after caching optimization. Deploying staging now.
engineering.sarahBuildTime: Great work on the build time. Let's target 3 minutes next sprint. @DevOps Engineer can you look into parallelizing the test suites?
engineering.frontendLib: Component library 80% done. Charts, tables, forms, modals all in. Data grid next.

product.jamesFunnel: Based on @Data Analyst's funnel analysis, we're prioritizing the onboarding redesign. This is Q2's top initiative.
product.pmMockups: @UI Designer can you have mockups by Thursday? I'll prepare the PRD today.
product.uiDesignerReply: Already started! Figma link will be in deliverables. New design tokens also ready for engineering.
product.emilyA11y: Love the direction. Make sure we keep the accessibility standards — WCAG AA minimum. I'll review Thursday afternoon.
product.dataAnalystConversion: New checkout flow shows 23% conversion improvement in A/B test. Full report in deliverables.

alpha.engLeadSprint: Alpha sprint day 3. Backend API done, frontend integration started. @Mobile Developer — payment endpoints live on staging.
alpha.mobileIntegration: Starting integration now. Payment flow ETA: 2 days.
alpha.jamesTimeline: Timeline tight but on track. @QA Lead prepare end-to-end test plan by Friday. This launch is board-visible.
alpha.qaLeadTestPlan: Test plan will cover payment flow, error recovery, and load testing. I'll coordinate with @Security Auditor for a pre-launch scan.
